description: Analyst-focused SOC view for the ICS honeypot. Emphasizes incident state, attack-chain coverage, and correlated host, application, and network truth. Zeek now runs from the VM-side sensor and relays east-west traffic back into this monitoring stack.

panels.description: Current SOC posture over the last 60 minutes: Normal, Investigating, or Active incident.

targets.expr: ((((sum(count_over_time({job="wazuh",source="wazuh",rule_id=~"100304|100305|100209"}[60m])) or vector(0)) > bool 0) * 2) + (((sum(count_over_time({job="wazuh",source="wazuh",rule_id=~"100301|100302|100303"}[60m])) or vector(0)) > bool 0)))

panels.title: Incident posture

panels.description: Most severe core detection observed in the last 24 hours.

targets.expr: topk(1, max by (rule_id, rule_description, rule_level) (count_over_time({job="ml",source="ml",kind="session_detection_event",session_id=~"$session_id"} | json rule_id="rule_id", rule_description="rule_description", rule_level="rule_level" | rule_id!="" [$__range])))

panels.title: Primary rule (session)

panels.description: How many asset classes registered at least one core detection in the last 24 hours.
panels.title: Asset classes hit

panels.description: Most frequent high-risk core rule in the last 24 hours.

targets.expr: topk(1, max by (rule_id, rule_description, rule_level) (count_over_time({job="ml",source="ml",kind="session_detection_event",session_id=~"$session_id"} | json rule_id="rule_id", rule_description="rule_description", rule_level="rule_level" | rule_id!="" | rule_level=~"([7-9]|[1-9][0-9]+)" [$__range])))

panels.title: Top high-risk rule (session)

panels.description: Historian activity visible across the current telemetry set, including east-west VM traffic seen by the remote Zeek sensor plus host/application confirmation.
panels.title: Historian web evidence

panels.description: Repository or file-share access mapped to T0811.
panels.title: SMB access

panels.description: OT path interaction mapped to T0886.
panels.title: OPC UA path

panels.description: Write-like OPC UA activity mapped to T0830.
panels.title: Write-like

panels.description: Critical write-like signal mapped to T0830.
panels.title: Critical write

panels.description: Integrity or process impact signal.
panels.title: Process anomaly

panels.description: Live EWS login and command execution evidence for analyst triage.

targets.expr: {job="ml",source="ml",kind="session_detection_event",session_id=~"$session_id"} | json evidence_key="evidence_key", rule_id="rule_id", matched_step="matched_step", attack_stage="attack_stage", asset_class="asset_class", rule_description="rule_description" | evidence_key=~"host_access|host_command|host_scriptblock|staged_tool" | line_format "step={{.matched_step}} | rule={{.rule_id}} | stage={{.attack_stage}} | evidence={{.evidence_key}} | asset={{.asset_class}} | detail={{.rule_description}}"

panels.title: EWS access and commands

panels.description: Historian and endpoint evidence correlated with network telemetry from the remote Zeek sensor.

targets.expr: {job="ml",source="ml",kind="session_detection_event",session_id=~"$session_id"} | json evidence_key="evidence_key", rule_id="rule_id", matched_step="matched_step", attack_stage="attack_stage", asset_class="asset_class", rule_description="rule_description" | evidence_key=~"historian_web|write_like|critical_write|process_anomaly|staged_tool" | line_format "step={{.matched_step}} | rule={{.rule_id}} | stage={{.attack_stage}} | evidence={{.evidence_key}} | asset={{.asset_class}} | detail={{.rule_description}}"

panels.title: Application activity

panels.description: Core Zeek and OT-path detections for what the monitoring interface can actually see. Missing east-west VM traffic here does not invalidate host/application-confirmed activity.

targets.expr: {job="ml",source="ml",kind="session_detection_event",session_id=~"$session_id"} | json evidence_key="evidence_key", rule_id="rule_id", matched_step="matched_step", attack_stage="attack_stage", asset_class="asset_class", rule_description="rule_description" | evidence_key=~"historian_web|smb_access|opcua_path|write_like|critical_write|discovery" | line_format "step={{.matched_step}} | rule={{.rule_id}} | stage={{.attack_stage}} | evidence={{.evidence_key}} | asset={{.asset_class}} | detail={{.rule_description}}"

panels.title: Network / OT path

panels.description: Volume of process anomaly detections to gauge host-side instability.
panels.title: Process anomalies

panels.description: Volume of write-like activity seen across the OT path.
panels.title: Write-like events

panels.description: Most recent higher-risk OT or process-impact events relevant to escalation.

targets.expr: {job="ml",source="ml",kind="session_detection_event",session_id=~"$session_id"} | json evidence_key="evidence_key", rule_id="rule_id", matched_step="matched_step", attack_stage="attack_stage", rule_description="rule_description", data_uid="data_uid", data_tag="data_tag", data_service="data_service", data_confidence="data_confidence" | evidence_key=~"process_anomaly|write_like|critical_write|staged_tool" | line_format "rule={{.rule_id}} step={{.matched_step}} stage={{.attack_stage}} uid={{ if .data_uid }}{{ .data_uid }}{{ else }}-{{ end }} target={{ if .data_tag }}{{ .data_tag }}{{ else if .data_service }}{{ .data_service }}{{ else }}-{{ end }} confidence={{ if .data_confidence }}{{ .data_confidence }}{{ else }}-{{ end }} note={{ .rule_description }}"

panels.title: Latest OT impact events

panels.description: Breakdown by attack stage across the current dashboard window.
panels.title: By attack stage

panels.description: Breakdown by asset class across the current dashboard window.
panels.title: By asset class

panels.description: Top triggered rule descriptions across the current dashboard window.

targets.expr: topk(10, sum by (rule_description) (count_over_time({job="ml",source="ml",kind="session_detection_event",session_id=~"$session_id"} | json rule_description="rule_description" | rule_description!="" [$__range])))

panels.title: Top rule descriptions

panels.description: High-priority feed for the incident story, kept full width for rapid triage.

targets.expr: {job="ml",source="ml",kind="session_detection_event",session_id=~"$session_id"} | json rule_level="rule_level", rule_id="rule_id", matched_step="matched_step", attack_stage="attack_stage", asset_class="asset_class", rule_description="rule_description", data_uid="data_uid" | rule_level=~"([7-9]|[1-9][0-9]+)" | line_format "rule={{.rule_id}} step={{.matched_step}} stage={{.attack_stage}} asset={{.asset_class}} uid={{ if .data_uid }}{{ .data_uid }}{{ else }}-{{ end }} note={{ .rule_description }}"

panels.title: Priority incident feed

panels.description: Short-form correlation view for the current session scope, blending remote-sensor network evidence with host and application truth.

targets.expr: {job="ml",source="ml",kind="session_detection_event",session_id=~"$session_id"} | json rule_level="rule_level", rule_id="rule_id", matched_step="matched_step", attack_stage="attack_stage", asset_class="asset_class", data_uid="data_uid", data_confidence="data_confidence" | rule_level=~"([7-9]|[1-9][0-9]+)" | line_format "rule={{.rule_id}} step={{.matched_step}} stage={{.attack_stage}} asset={{.asset_class}} uid={{ if .data_uid }}{{ .data_uid }}{{ else }}-{{ end }} confidence={{ if .data_confidence }}{{ .data_confidence }}{{ else }}-{{ end }}"

panels.title: Session correlation digest

options.content:
This dashboard is session-scoped end to end.  
Paste a specific Streamlit demo ID in `Session scope` to filter both the live detections and the ML correlation rows. Use `.*` for all recent sessions.

panels.title: Correlated sessions in view
panels.description: Full correlated sessions visible in the current dashboard time window and session scope.

panels.title: Critical sessions in view
panels.description: Correlated sessions currently marked critical inside the selected window and session scope.

panels.title: Highest risk in view
panels.description: Highest predicted danger score among the selected correlated sessions.

panels.title: Distinct intents in view
panels.description: How many distinct analyst-facing session intents are visible right now.

panels.title: Correlated session summaries
panels.description: Analyst-facing ML summaries for full correlated sessions.

targets.expr: {job="ml",source="ml",kind="correlated_session_summary",session_id=~"$session_id"} | json | line_format "priority={{.predicted_priority}} risk={{.predicted_danger_label}} intent={{.predicted_session_intent_hybrid}} session={{.session_id}} assets={{.asset_path}} path={{.stage_path}} note={{.summary_text}}"

panels.title: Session progression
panels.description: Prefix-level risk buildup for each correlated session.

targets.expr: {job="ml",source="ml",kind="session_progression",session_id=~"$session_id"} | json | line_format "session={{.session_id}} step={{.event_count}}/{{.total_event_count}} risk={{.predicted_danger_label}} score={{.predicted_danger_score}} intent={{.predicted_session_intent_hybrid}} stage={{.predicted_dominant_stage}} path={{.stage_path}}"

panels.title: Priority incident queue
panels.description: High-priority correlated sessions the SOC should triage first.

targets.expr: {job="ml",source="ml",kind="correlated_session_summary",session_id=~"$session_id"} | json | predicted_priority=~"P1|P2" | line_format "priority={{.predicted_priority}} risk={{.predicted_danger_label}} intent={{.predicted_session_intent_hybrid}} session={{.session_id}} note={{.summary_text}}"

panels.title: Live SCADA Audit Log — L2 Events
SCADA Recon — Nmap Probes + Plant State Reads (T0846 / T0888)

list.name: session_id
list.label: Session scope
list.description: Paste a specific demo session ID for the live attack console. Use .* for all recent sessions.

title: SOC / Honeypot Detection Dashboard
